description.ko: 질서와 혼돈이 만나는 극명한 탐구로, 경직된 기하학이 디지털 불안정성에 의해 파편화되는 모습을 담았습니다.
description.en: A stark exploration of order meeting chaos, where rigid geometry is fractured by digital instability.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian sculpture of a fragmented digital mask by KURO-X, undergoing a violent geometric deconstruction. Sharp, recursive #808080 shards and #C0C0C0 pixel-sorted glitches are frozen in mid-explosion against a clinical #FFFFFF vacuum. High-contrast cinematic lighting, razor-sharp raytraced reflections, intense chromatic aberration, and digital scanlines. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, precise mathematical chaos.
